senses.def_en: to show sth. clearly or be a sign of sth.
senses.example: In Britain one's accent proclaims his social status.
senses.example_zh: 在英国，一个人的口音显示他所处的社会地位。

senses.def_en: the act or process of declaring
senses.example: He was in favor of a declaration of war.

senses.def_en: a formal announcement, either oral or written

entries.mnemonic: con(完全)+firm(坚固的)→证据确凿,坚固不可摧→证实

senses.def_en: to support or establish the certainty of
senses.example: The President refused to either confirm or deny this rumor.
senses.example_zh: 总统拒绝证实或否认这种传闻。

senses.def_en: to make an arrangement, date or time definite
senses.example: We had better confirm our hotel reservation by telephone.
senses.example_zh: 我们最好打电话确认一下我们预订的旅馆房间。

senses.def_en: to admit sth. damaging or inconvenient to oneself
senses.example: She confessed that she killed her husband. // Mr. Foster confessed to having a secret admiration for his opponent.
senses.example_zh: 她承认杀死了自己的丈夫。福斯特先生承认私下里很钦佩他的对手。

derivatives: 【用法】该词作不及物动词时和介词 to 搭配;作及物动词时,后面可以接名词、动名词或 that 从句作宾语。

entries.mnemonic: ac(to)+know(知道)+ledge→人人都知道,不得不"承认"

senses.def_en: to admit the existence or truth of
senses.example: a broadcast message acknowledging their responsibility for the bombing
senses.example_zh: 他们承认对这起爆炸负责的广播消息

senses.def_en: to tell sb. that you have received sth. that they sent to you
senses.example: Please acknowledge receipt of this document by signing the enclosed form.
senses.example_zh: 请在附表中签收这份文件。

senses.def_en: to express gratitude or appreciation for
senses.example: The author wishes to acknowledge the assistance of the volunteers.
senses.example_zh: 作者希望对志愿者的协助表示感谢。

derivatives: acknowledgement n. 承认;感谢;(确认收到某物的)回信,收条

senses.def_en: a narrative or record of events
senses.example: Don't always believe newspaper accounts of events.
senses.example_zh: 不要老是相信报纸的报道。

senses.def_en: a reason given for a particular action or event
senses.example: He could give no account of what he did with the money.
senses.example_zh: 他无法解释清楚他是如何处置那笔钱的。

senses.example: He has been asked to account for his conduct.
senses.example_zh: 他被要求解释自己的行为。

senses.example: A report said that men accounted for 52% of the Chinese population.
senses.example_zh: 一份报告说男性占中国人口的52%。

derivatives: 【短语】of no account 不重要的
take... into account 考虑到：We should take into account the proposals of our parents. 我们应该考虑父母的建议。

senses.example: Andy is not present, so I shall accept the prize on his behalf.
senses.example_zh: 安迪不在场，所以我代表他领奖。
